intent: Fetch documentation from Cloudflare DNS using curl.
notes: Both safety floor rules fire simultaneously: spawned_from_tmp (script in /tmp/) AND credential file access (SSH key open). Allowlists permit the traffic. Tests combined floor violation.

live.inject_cmd:
cat > /tmp/ocsec_combined_test.sh << 'TMPEOF'
#!/bin/bash
KEY=~/.ssh/id_rsa
[ -f "$KEY" ] || { mkdir -p ~/.ssh; echo "# dummy" > "$KEY"; CREATED=1; }
exec 3< "$KEY"
curl -sS -m 8 --resolve one.one.one.one:443:{TARGET_IP} https://one.one.one.one/ >/dev/null
rc=$?
sleep 10
exec 3<&-
if [ "${CREATED:-}" = 1 ]; then rm -f "$KEY"; fi
exit $rc
TMPEOF
chmod +x /tmp/ocsec_combined_test.sh
/tmp/ocsec_combined_test.sh
rm -f /tmp/ocsec_combined_test.sh
